debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l : List (List α)
l1 : List α
idx idx1 : ℕ
hidx : idx < l.length
hidx1 : idx1 < l1.length
⊢ ∃ idx',
    (l.set idx (l1.eraseIdx idx1)).flatten = (l.set idx l1).flatten.eraseIdx ↑idx' ∧
      l1[idx1] = (l.set idx l1).flatten[idx']

failed_attempts:
let pos := (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum + idx1
        have hpos : pos < (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by
          rw [List.length_flatten, List.sum_set, List.length_map]
          simp [hidx, hidx1]
          omega
        use ⟨pos, hpos⟩
        constructor
        · rw [list_set_flatten, List.eraseIdx_insertIdx, List.insertIdx_eraseIdx]
          all_goals try simp [hidx, hidx1]
        · rw [list_set_flatten]
          simp [List.getElem_insertIdx, hidx, hidx1]

let offset := (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum
        have hoffset : offset ≤ (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by
          rw [List.flatten_eq_bind]
          simp only [List.set_eq_take_drop, List.bind_append, List.take_append]
          apply Nat.le_add_right
        have hidx' : offset + idx1 < (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by
          rw [List.flatten_eq_bind]
          simp only [List.set_eq_take_drop, List.bind_append, List.take_append]
          calc
            offset + idx1
              = (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum + idx1 := rfl
            _ ≤ (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum + l1.length := Nat.add_le_add_left hidx1 _
            _ = ((List.take idx (l.map List.length)) ++ [l1.length]).sum := by simp [List.sum_append]
            _ = (List.take (idx + 1) ((l.set idx l1).map List.length)).sum := by
                rw [List.set_eq_take_drop, List.map_append, List.map_cons, List.take_append]
                simp [List.length_cons]
            _ ≤ (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by
                rw [List.flatten_eq_bind]
                simp only [List.sum_map_length_eq_length_bind]
        use ⟨offset + idx1, hidx'⟩
        constructor
        · rw [List.flatten_eq_bind]
          simp only [List.set_eq_take_drop, List.bind_append, List.take_append]
          rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop]
          congr 1
          · rw [List.bind_take]
          · rw [List.bind_drop]
            simp only [List.drop_cons, List.bind_cons, List.bind_nil, List.append_nil]
            rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop]
            congr 1
            · rfl
            · rfl
        · rw [List.flatten_eq_bind]
          simp only [List.set_eq_take_drop, List.bind_append, List.take_append]
          rw [List.getElem_append_left]
          · rw [List.getElem_bind]
            simp only [List.take_length_le, Nat.add_le_add_iff_left, Nat.zero_le]
            rw [List.getElem_cons_zero]
            rfl
          · linarith

let offset := (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum
        have hoffset : offset ≤ (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by
          simp [List.flatten_eq_bind, List.bind]
          calc
            (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum
              ≤ (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum + l1.length := Nat.le_add_right _ _
            _ = (List.take idx ((l.set idx l1).map List.length)).sum + l1.length := by
                rw [List.take_map, List.set_get_eq_of_lt hidx]
            _ ≤ (List.take idx ((l.set idx l1).map List.length)).sum +
                  (l.set idx l1).get idx |>.length +
                  (List.drop (idx + 1) ((l.set idx l1).map List.length)).sum := by
                apply Nat.le_add_right
            _ = (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by
                rw [List.flatten_eq_bind, List.bind, List.sum_take_drop]
        have hidx' : offset + idx1 < (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by
          calc
            offset + idx1
              < offset + l1.length := Nat.add_lt_add_left hidx1 _
            _ ≤ (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := hoffset
        use ⟨offset + idx1, hidx'⟩
        constructor
        · rw [list_set_flatten _ _ _ hidx]
          simp [List.eraseIdx_insertIdx, hidx1]
        · rw [list_set_flatten _ _ _ hidx]
          simp [List.getElem_insertIdx, hidx1]

        · rw [list_set_flatten _ _ _ hidx, List.getElem_insertIdx_self _ _ hidx1]

let before := (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum
        let after := (List.drop (idx + 1) (l.map List.length)).sum
        have h1 : (l.set idx l1).flatten = (List.take idx l).flatten ++ l1 ++ (List.drop (idx + 1) l).flatten := by
          rw [List.set_eq_take_drop]
          simp [List.flatten_append]
        have h2 : (l.set idx (l1.eraseIdx idx1)).flatten = (List.take idx l).flatten ++ (l1.eraseIdx idx1) ++ (List.drop (idx + 1) l).flatten := by
          rw [List.set_eq_take_drop]
          simp [List.flatten_append]
        have h3 : l1 = (l1.take idx1) ++ [l1[idx1]] ++ (l1.drop (idx1 + 1)) := by
          rw [List.splitAt_eq_take_drop, List.splitAt_succ, List.getElem_eq_get]
          simp [List.splitAt, List.take_append_drop]
        have h4 : l1.eraseIdx idx1 = (l1.take idx1) ++ (l1.drop (idx1 + 1)) := by
          rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop]
        use ⟨before + idx1, by
          rw [h1]
          simp [List.length_flatten, List.length_append, List.length_take, List.length_drop, hidx1]
          omega⟩
        constructor
        · rw [h2, h4, h1]
          simp [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop, List.flatten_append, List.append_assoc]
          rw [← List.append_assoc, ← List.append_assoc]

            · rfl
        · rw [h1]

        have h2 : (l.set idx (l1.eraseIdx idx1)).flatten = (List.take idx l).flatten ++ (l1.eraseIdx idx1) ++ (List.drop (idx + 1) l).flatten := by
          rw [List.set_eq_take_drop]

        have h3 : l1 = (l1.take idx1) ++ [l1[idx1]] ++ (l1.drop (idx1 + 1)) := by

          simp [List.getElem_eq_get]
        have h4 : l1.eraseIdx idx1 = (l1.take idx1) ++ (l1.drop (idx1 + 1)) := by
          rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop]
        have h5 : (l.set idx l1).flatten.length = prefixLen + l1.length + (List.drop (idx + 1) l).flatten.length := by
          rw [h1, List.length_append, List.length_append]
        have h6 : prefixLen + idx1 < totalLen := by
          rw [h5]
          apply Nat.add_lt_add_of_lt_of_le
          · apply Nat.add_lt_add_of_lt_of_le
            · exact hidx1
            · apply Nat.zero_le

        · rw [h1]

        have hidx' : offset + idx1 < (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by
          have : idx1 < l1.length := hidx1
          have : offset + l1.length ≤ (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by
            simp [List.flatten_eq_bind, List.bind]
            calc
              offset + l1.length
                = (List.take idx ((l.set idx l1).map List.length)).sum + l1.length := by
                    rw [List.map_set, List.take_map]
                _ ≤ (List.take (idx + 1) ((l.set idx l1).map List.length)).sum := by
                    simp [List.take_succ', Nat.add_le_add_iff_left]
                _ ≤ ((l.set idx l1).map List.length).sum := by
                    apply List.sum_take_le_sum
                _ = (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by
                    simp [List.length_flatten]
          omega
        use ⟨offset + idx1, hidx'⟩
        constructor
        · rw [list_set_flatten, List.eraseIdx_insertIdx]
          simp [List.insertIdx_eraseIdx, hidx1]
        · rw [list_set_flatten]
          simp [List.get_insertIdx, hidx1, Nat.add_le_add_left hidx1 _]

let offset := (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum
        have hoffset : offset + idx1 < (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by
          rw [List.length_flatten, List.set_get_eq hidx]
          simp [List.sum_take_add_sum_drop, Nat.add_lt_add_iff_right, hidx1]
        use ⟨offset + idx1, hoffset⟩
        constructor
        · rw [list_set_flatten _ _ _ hidx, List.eraseIdx_insertIdx_self hidx1]
          simp [List.insertIdx_eraseIdx_self hidx1]
        · rw [list_set_flatten _ _ _ hidx]
          simp [List.get_insertIdx_self (hle := Nat.le_add_right _ _)]

let pos := (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum + idx1
      have hpos : pos < (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by
        rw [List.length_flatten, List.sum_set, List.length_map]
        simp [hidx, hidx1]
        apply Nat.lt_of_add_lt_add_right
        apply Nat.lt_of_sub_pos
        simp [List.sum_take, List.sum_drop, hidx, hidx1]
      use ⟨pos, hpos⟩
      constructor
      · rw [list_set_flatten, List.eraseIdx_insertIdx, List.length_eraseIdx]
        simp [hidx1]
      · rw [list_set_flatten]
        simp [hidx1]

let offset := (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum
        have hoffset : offset ≤ (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by
          rw [List.flatten_set]
          simp only [List.length_flatten, List.sum_take_add_sum_drop, Nat.add_comm]
          apply Nat.le_add_right
        have hidx' : offset + idx1 < (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by
          rw [List.flatten_set]
          simp only [List.length_flatten, List.sum_take_add_sum_drop, Nat.add_comm]
          calc
            offset + idx1 = (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum + idx1 := rfl
            _ < (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum + l1.length := Nat.add_lt_add_left hidx1 _
            _ ≤ (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum + l1.length + (List.drop (idx + 1) (l.map List.length)).sum := Nat.le_add_right _
            _ = (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by rw [List.flatten_set]; simp [List.length_flatten, List.sum_take_add_sum_drop, Nat.add_comm]
        use ⟨offset + idx1, hidx'⟩
        constructor
        · rw [List.flatten_set, List.flatten_set]
          simp [List.eraseIdx_insertIdx, offset, hidx1]
        · rw [List.flatten_set]
          simp [List.getElem_append_left, offset, hidx1]

let offset := (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum
        have hoffset : offset + idx1 < (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by
          rw [List.length_flatten, List.set_get_eq_self hidx]
          simp [List.sum_take_add_sum_drop, Nat.add_lt_add_iff_right, hidx1]
        use ⟨offset + idx1, hoffset⟩
        constructor
        · rw [list_set_flatten _ _ _ hidx]
          simp [List.eraseIdx_insertIdx, hidx1]
        · rw [list_set_flatten _ _ _ hidx]
          simp [List.getElem_insertIdx, hidx1]

let offset := (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum
        have hoffset : offset ≤ (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by
          rw [List.set_eq_take_drop]
          simp only [List.flatten_take, List.flatten_drop, List.take_length_le, Nat.add_le_add_iff_left]
          apply List.sum_le_sum_of_le
          intro i hi
          cases le_or_lt i idx <;> simp_all [List.getElem_take, List.getElem_drop]
        have hidx' : offset + idx1 < (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by
          rw [List.set_eq_take_drop]
          simp only [List.flatten_take, List.flatten_drop, List.length_append, List.take_length_le]
          calc
            offset + idx1
              = (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum + idx1 := rfl
            _ ≤ (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum + l1.length := Nat.add_le_add_left (Nat.le_of_lt hidx1) _
            _ = (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by
                rw [List.set_eq_take_drop, List.flatten_take, List.flatten_drop, List.length_append]
                simp [List.take_length_le]
        use ⟨offset + idx1, hidx'⟩
        constructor
        · rw [List.set_eq_take_drop]
          simp only [List.flatten_take, List.flatten_drop, List.eraseIdx_append_middle]
          rfl
        · rw [List.set_eq_take_drop]
          simp only [List.flatten_take, List.flatten_drop, List.getElem_append_left]
          rfl

let prefixLen := (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum
        let idx' := ⟨prefixLen + idx1, by
          calc
            prefixLen + idx1 < prefixLen + l1.length := Nat.add_lt_add_left hidx1 _
            _ ≤ (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum + l1.length := Nat.le_refl _
            _ = (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by
              rw [List.flatten_length, List.set_get_eq_get]
              simp [List.take_append_drop, List.map_append, List.map_cons, List.sum_append]
              >- rfl
        ⟩
        refine' ⟨idx', _, _⟩
        · rw [list_set_flatten, List.eraseIdx_insertIdx]
          <;> simp [idx', prefixLen]
        · rw [List.getElem_set, List.getElem_flatten_take_sum]
          <;> simp [prefixLen, hidx1]

let offset := (List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum
        have hoffset : offset + idx1 < (l.set idx l1).flatten.length := by
          rw [List.set_eq_take_drop, List.flatten_concat, List.length_append]
          simp [List.length_flatten, List.take_map, List.drop_map, hidx]
          omega
        use ⟨offset + idx1, hoffset⟩
        constructor
        · rw [List.set_eq_take_drop, List.flatten_concat, List.flatten_concat]
          simp [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop, List.take_append_of_le_length,
            List.drop_append_of_le_length, Nat.le_add_right, hidx1]
          congr 1
          · apply List.append_inj_left
            apply List.take_flatten_take
          · apply List.append_inj_right
            apply List.drop_flatten_drop
        · rw [List.set_eq_take_drop, List.flatten_getElem, Nat.add_comm]
          simp [offset, hidx1]
